title: German Roast Beef Sandwiches
description: A classic German-inspired sandwich featuring tender roast beef, melted cheese, and crispy bread.

ingredients.name: Bread
ingredients.notes: Challah or rustic bread work well

ingredients.name: Melted cheese
ingredients.notes: Cheddar or Swiss cheese pair well with roast beef

instructions: 2. Slice the roast beef into thin strips and season with salt and pepper.
3. Butter the bread slices on the outside.
4. Place the beef on one slice of bread, top with cheese, and place the second slice of bread on top.
5. Place the sandwiches on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the bread is toasted and the cheese is melted.
6. Remove from the oven and garnish with chopped parsley.
